headline: Housing Will Be An Albatross On The U.S. Economy Throughout 2026
summary: Housing is dragging on the U.S. economy in 2026, as sales slump and affordability stays weak despite lower mortgage rates. Read what investors need to know.

summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading modestly lower as many across Wall Street breathed a semi-sigh of relief yesterday after oil futures, which shot up to $120 overnight, retreated below $100 on Monday.
